title: Verdant Vale
description: Modpack made by Selim, Peggle_, BellaWorld1 for friends and anyone else who wants a fun pack to play.
body:
# **Verdant Vale**

This is a pack originally meant for just friends which turned into something much bigger. It has a little something for everyone to enjoy. Tech for the engineers. Magic for the wizards. Exploration for those looking for new heights. Building for the cozy gamer. Mods that enchance combat and more.

Notable Mods:

*   Better Combat
*   YUNG's Suite
*   Mekanism
*   Timeless and Classic Zero
*   Ars Nouveau
*   [Quark](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark)
*   [When Dungeons Arise](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/when-dungeons-arise)
*   [Trash Slot](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/trashslot) + [balm](http://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/balm) + [Waystones](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/waystones)
*   [Simple Voice Chat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-voice-chat)
*   [Common Network](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/common-network)
*   And more
